    I

    InvitationFragment - Class in com.example.codebase
    A Fragment that presents a lottery invitation to an Entrant, allowing them to accept or decline their selected spot in an Event.
    InvitationFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.InvitationFragment
     
    Invitations - Class in com.example.codebase
    Controller class to manage Entrant invitations locally.
    Invitations() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.Invitations
     
    InvitationsActivity - Class in com.example.codebase
    Displays the list of lottery invitations for the current device's entrant.
    InvitationsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.InvitationsActivity
     
    InvitedEntrant(String, String) - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.InvitedEntrantsActivity.InvitedEntrant
    Constructs an InvitedEntrant with the given device ID and status.
    InvitedEntrantsActivity - Class in com.example.codebase
    Displays all selected entrants for an event, split across four tabs: All, Pending, Accepted, and Declined.
    InvitedEntrantsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.InvitedEntrantsActivity
     
    InvitedEntrantsActivity.InvitedEntrant - Class in com.example.codebase
    Lightweight model representing a single selected entrant and their current invitation status.
    InvitedEntrantsAdapter - Class in com.example.codebase
    RecyclerView.Adapter for the Invited Entrants screen.
    InvitedEntrantsAdapter(List<InvitedEntrantsActivity.InvitedEntrant>, InvitedEntrantsAdapter.CancelListener) - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.InvitedEntrantsAdapter
    Constructs the adapter with an initial entrant list and a cancel listener.
    InvitedEntrantsAdapter.CancelListener - Interface in com.example.codebase
    Callback interface implemented by the host activity to handle cancel requests initiated from this adapter.
    isEditMode - Variable in class com.example.codebase.CreateEventViewModel
    true when the wizard was launched to edit an existing event, false for new event creation.
    isGeoEnabled() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns whether geolocation verification is enabled for this event.
    isRead() - Method in class com.example.codebase.AppNotification
    Returns whether the entrant has read this notification.
